description: Phase 13 Plan 05 — TOOL-05 byte-identical reference snapshot.
what_it_locks: When the flag is off, chat.py uses tool_service.get_available_tools(...) for the LLM tools array AND build_skill_catalog_block(...) for the system-prompt skill block. Neither path touches tool_registry. The fixture below is captured directly from those two functions for a fixed input matrix.
invariant: Plan 13-05 chat.py edits MUST NOT change the OpenRouter request payload when tool_registry_enabled=false. The tools array must equal tool_service.get_available_tools(...) and the skill block must equal build_skill_catalog_block(...) for any (user, history, message) — a property that holds because both paths are gated behind `if settings.tool_registry_enabled:` (else-branch is the byte-identical legacy path).
